brand.name: Sabiosphere
brand.tagline: Shape Your Space, Shape Your Life.

hero.title:
Shape Your Space,
Shape Your Life.
hero.subtitle: Sabiosphere crafts sophisticated residential and commercial interiors that balance beauty, function and emotion — designed around the way you actually live.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Designing Elegant Spaces With Purpose & Precision
about.description: Great design begins with listening. Since 2019, Sabiosphere has stayed deeply involved in every project from first sketch to final handover, blending architecture, interiors and sustainability into timeless living experiences that tell a story and evoke emotion.
about.founderQuote: Great design begins with listening. I stay deeply involved from start to finish, so every space we create genuinely reflects the people who live in it.

principal.title: Meet the Principal
principal.name: Architect Mansi Rajgarhia
principal.bio: , the Founder & Principal Designer of Sabiosphere Studios, is a visionary designer who crafts spaces with purpose, passion, and precision.
principal.quote: Great design begins with listening. I stay deeply involved from start to finish, ensuring every space not only fulfills my client's needs but also remains a masterpiece that stands the test of time with minimal changes.

budgets.title: Homes for every budget
budgets.subtitle: Our interior designers work with you keeping in mind your requirements and budget
budgets.note: *The prices include only modular interiors for new homes.

videoReview.quote: Our experience with Sabiosphere was pleasurable because of the project managers. The work got done before 45 days just the way we wanted it to be.
videoReview.author: Swati and Gaurav

items.title: Residential Design
items.description: Bespoke homes, villas and apartments designed around how you actually live.

items.title: Commercial Design
items.description: Offices, wellness centres and F&B spaces built to elevate every visit.

items.title: Renovation
items.description: Reimagining existing spaces with new layouts, finishes and life.

items.title: Procurement Service
items.description: End-to-end sourcing of furniture, fixtures and finishes, handled for you.

steps.title: Site Meeting
steps.description: We visit your space to understand the brief, the site and your lifestyle.

steps.title: Concept Discussion
steps.description: Moodboards and concepts that translate your brief into a design direction.

steps.title: Design Refinement
steps.description: Detailed layouts, materials and finishes refined with your feedback.

steps.title: Execution
steps.description: On-ground execution managed closely to match the approved design.

steps.title: Handover
steps.description: A final walkthrough and styling before the space becomes yours.

items.name: Riya Kapoor
items.quote: Sabiosphere understood our family before they drew a single line. The home feels like us, only better.

items.name: Arjun Malhotra
items.quote: Every detail, from light to layout, was considered. Our clients comment on the space before they even sit down.

items.name: Neha & Sameer
items.quote: Calm, clear communication through every stage of a renovation that could have been stressful. It wasn't, even once.

cta.title: Have A Space In Mind?
cta.subtitle: Tell us about your project and let's shape something timeless together.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Let's Start Your Project
contact.description: Share a few details about your space and we'll get back to you within 2 business days.
contact.whatsappMessage: Hi Sabiosphere, I'd like to know more about your interior design services.

footer.description: A luxury interior design and architecture studio shaping timeless, sustainable spaces.
